name: Download External URL
description: Downloads any file, backup, data sheet, image, or ZIP archive from a public URL on the internet and saves it safely in the local user_data sandbox environment.

url.description: The precise public HTTP or HTTPS web URL of the file to download.

filename.description: The target name to save the file as in the workspace sandbox (e.g. 'spreadsheet.csv'). If left empty, Yui will intelligently guess it from the URL or server headers.
